TX RTS Control.name: B0RTSM

fields.name: B0RTSM
fields.description:
TX0RTS Pin mode bit
1 = Pin is used to request message transmission of TXB0 buffer (on falling edge)
0 = Digital input

enum_values.1: Pin is used to request message transmission of TXB0 buffer (on falling edge)

quality_issues: address 0x00 not found in register summary table

TX RTS Control.name: TXRTSCTRL
TX RTS Control.description: TXnRTS Pin Control and Status Register

fields.name: B2RTS
fields.description:
TX2RTS Pin State bit
- Reads state of TX2RTS pin when in Digital Input mode
- Reads as '0' when pin is in 'Request-to-Send' mode

fields.name: B1RTS
fields.description:
TX1RTS Pin State bit
- Reads state of TX1RTS pin when in Digital Input mode
- Reads as '0' when pin is in 'Request-to-Send' mode

fields.name: B0RTS
fields.description:
TX0RTS Pin State bit
- Reads state of TX0RTS pin when in Digital Input mode
- Reads as '0' when pin is in 'Request-to-Send' mode

fields.name: B2RTSM
fields.description:
TX2RTS Pin mode bit
1 = Pin is used to request message transmission of TXB2 buffer (on falling edge)
0 = Digital input

fields.name: B1RTSM
fields.description:
TX1RTS Pin mode bit
1 = Pin is used to request message transmission of TXB1 buffer (on falling edge)
0 = Digital input

fields.name: B0RTSM
fields.description:
TX0RTS Pin mode bit
1 = Pin is used to request message transmission of TXB0 buffer (on falling edge)
0 = Digital input

quality_issues: duplicate field name 'UNIMPLEMENTED'

RX Buffer Pin Control.name: BFPCTRL

fields.name: B1BFS
fields.description: RX1BF Pin State bit (Digital Output mode only) - Reads as '0' when RX1BF is configured as interrupt pin

fields.name: B0BFS
fields.description: RX0BF Pin State bit (Digital Output mode only) - Reads as '0' when RX0BF is configured as interrupt pin

fields.name: B1BFE
fields.description: RX1BF Pin Function Enable bit 1 = Pin function enabled, operation mode determined by B1BFM bit 0 = Pin function disabled, pin goes to high-impedance state

fields.name: B0BFE
fields.description: RX0BF Pin Function Enable bit 1 = Pin function enabled, operation mode determined by B0BFM bit

fields.name: B1BFM
fields.description: RX1BF Pin Operation Mode bit 1 = Pin is used as interrupt when valid message loaded into RXB1 0 = Digital Output mode

fields.name: B0BFM
fields.description: RX0BF Pin Operation Mode bit 1 = Pin is used as interrupt when valid message loaded into RXB0 0 = Digital Output mode

quality_issues: duplicate field name '-'

TX Buffers Control.name: TXB0CTRL

fields.name: ABTF
fields.description:
Message Aborted Flag bit
1 = Message was aborted
0 = Message completed transmission successfully

fields.name: MLOA
fields.description:
Message Lost Arbitration bit
1 = Message lost arbitration while being sent
0 = Message did not lose arbitration while being sent

fields.name: TXERR
fields.description:
Transmission Error Detected bit
1 = A bus error occurred while the message was being transmitted
0 = No bus error occurred while the message was being transmitted

fields.name: TXREQ
fields.description:
Message Transmit Request bit
1 = Buffer is currently pending transmission (MCU sets this bit to request message be transmitted - bit is automatically cleared when the message is sent)
0 = Buffer is not currently pending transmission (MCU can clear this bit to request a message abort)

fields.name: TXP
fields.description:
Transmit Buffer Priority <1:0> bits
11 = Highest Message Priority
10 = High Intermediate Message Priority
01 = Low Intermediate Message Priority
00 = Lowest Message Priority

quality_issues: duplicate field name 'UNIMPLEMENTED'

enum_values.1: Message was aborted
Message lost arbitration while being sent
enum_values.0: Message did not lose arbitration while being sent

enum_values.1: A bus error occurred while the message was being transmitted
enum_values.0: No bus error occurred while the message was being transmitted

enum_values.0: Buffer is not currently pending transmission (MCU can clear this bit to request a message abort)

RX Buffer 0.name: RXB0CTRL

fields.name: RXM1
fields.description:
Receive Buffer Operating Mode bits
11 = Turn mask/filters off; receive any message
10 = Receive only valid messages with extended identifiers that meet filter criteria
01 = Receive only valid messages with standard identifiers that meet filter criteria
00 = Receive all valid messages using either standard or extended identifiers that meet filter criteria

fields.name: RXRTR
fields.description:
Received Remote Transfer Request bit
1 = Remote Transfer Request Received
0 = No Remote Transfer Request Received

fields.name: BUKT
fields.description:
BUKT: Rollover Enable bit
1 = RXB0 message will rollover and be written to RXB1 if RXB0 is full
0 = Rollover disabled
BUKT1: Read-only Copy of BUKT bit (used internally by the MCP2515)

fields.name: FILHIT0
fields.description:
Filter Hit bit - indicates which acceptance filter enabled reception of message
1 = Acceptance Filter 1 (RXF1)
0 = Acceptance Filter 0 (RXF0)

RX Buffer 1.name: RXB1CTRL

fields.name: RXM1
fields.description:
Receive Buffer Operating Mode bits
11 = Turn mask/filters off; receive any message
10 = Receive only valid messages with extended identifiers that meet filter criteria
01 = Receive only valid messages with standard identifiers that meet filter criteria
00 = Receive all valid messages using either standard or extended identifiers that meet filter criteria

fields.name: RXRTR
fields.description:
Received Remote Transfer Request bit
1 = Remote Transfer Request Received
0 = No Remote Transfer Request Received

fields.name: FILHIT
fields.description:
Filter Hit bits - indicates which acceptance filter enabled reception of message
101 = Acceptance Filter 5 (RXF5)
100 = Acceptance Filter 4 (RXF4)
011 = Acceptance Filter 3 (RXF3)
010 = Acceptance Filter 2 (RXF2)
001 = Acceptance Filter 1 (RXF1) (Only if BUKT bit set in RXB0CTRL)
000 = Acceptance Filter 0 (RXF0) (Only if BUKT bit set in RXB0CTRL)
